# Setting Up a Subscription

Eligible consumable products such as filters and batteries can be placed on a recurring subscription at checkout, with shipment intervals of thirty, sixty, or ninety days. Subscription orders get a standing five percent discount off the regular price, applied automatically to every recurring shipment.

[Source: subscription_orders.md#setting-up-a-subscription]
